description: Canonical filesystem path registry for Archon Prime tooling modules. All path resolution must reference this registry. Paths are expressed relative to AP_ROOT unless noted.

execution_envelopes.description: Active execution envelope directory. Must contain ENVELOPE_MANIFEST.json.
execution_envelopes.notes: Read-only during execution. Envelope is loaded once at environment_verification phase.

tooling_root.description: Root of all workflow mutation tooling modules.

audit_reports.description: Canonical output location for all audit, validation, and structural reports.
audit_reports.notes: All audit outputs must be written here. AP_SYSTEM_CONFIG/ is frozen and must not receive report writes.

processing_reports.description: Runtime execution reports written during pipeline processing.

processing_completed.description: Archive directory for completed workflow target envelopes.

processing_active.description: In-progress processing workspace for the active target.

completion_logs.description: Completion log artifacts for each processed envelope.

runtime_logs.description: Runtime execution logs produced by the pipeline controller and subsystems.
runtime_logs.notes: Runtime logs co-locate with processing reports. Subsystem logs are prefixed with subsystem name.

target_audits.description: Per-target audit logs and module outputs.

system_audit_outputs.description: System-level audit scan results and phase reports.

system_config.description: SYSTEM meta-configuration layer. Frozen. No runtime writes permitted.
system_config.notes: This path is canonicalized and frozen. Tooling reads from this path; it must never write to it.
